title: coleus engleri
intro: Coleus engleri, also known as Coleus scutellarioides, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Africa and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Coleus engleri include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as promoting digestion and respiratory health. The plant's leaves are commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
